title: PDF Preview is only first page - new issue, worked before
excerpt: Hello!About a week ago, the pdf preview in the files column started only showing the first page. Before, it showed the whole document. When I download the file, it’s all there. Not sure why things changed?

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello!About a week ago, the pdf preview in the files column started only showing the first page. Before, it showed the whole document. When I download the file, it’s all there. Not sure why things changed?
